per_query.answer: If the projected balance exceeds the credit limit, the order is placed on credit hold and routed to a credit analyst for manual review.
Safety stock does not by itself trigger a purchase requisition; the reorder point does.
A closed period can be reopened only with controller approval.
Posting a shipment decrements on-hand inventory and triggers invoice generation in the billing step.
Every posting writes an audit-trail entry capturing the user, timestamp, and before/after values.
The classification drives the cycle-count frequency for each item.
The Inventory Module compares the counted quantity against the system on-hand quantity to compute a count variance.
Auditors query the trail to reconstruct how a balance was reached.
Safety stock does not by itself trigger a purchase requisition; the reorder point does.
Stillwater Industrial policy requires a credit check before a sales order is confirmed.
Three-way matching compares the supplier invoice against the purchase order and the goods receipt.
If on-hand quantity is insufficient, the line is partially allocated and a backorder record is created for the remainder.
The Inventory Module compares the counted quantity against the system on-hand quantity to compute a count variance.
Early-payment discounts are taken when the discount date has not passed.
A short payment leaves the invoice partially open.
